name: Many-Splendored Guacamole
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup chorizo sausage, minced or kielbasa or andouille
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mash the avocados.
2. Stir in the lemon juice.
3. Add the chopped scallions, garlic, jalapenos, tomato, jicama (if using), sour cream, Worcestershire sauce, olive oil, white-wine vinegar, ground cumin, chili powder, salsa, Monterey Jack cheese, chorizo sausage or kielbasa or andouille, tequila, and cilantro.
4. Mix until well combined and season with salt to taste.
5. Wrap the guacamole tightly in plastic wrap if not serving immediately.
6. Makes 5 1/2 cups.
